overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a 1960s American city. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses cobblestone streets, and passes by a large stadium structure and residential buildings under overcast skies with wet pavement reflecting the diffused light.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along concrete sidewalk toward a large stadium building in the distance

entered.detail: large stone building with arched windows and a billboard on top
vintage 1960s sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk in an urban area, approaching a large stadium building visible in the distance. The street is lined with parked vintage cars and apartment buildings under an overcast sky.

events.description: vintage maroon sedan drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk, approaching a crosswalk near the stadium entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking on sidewalk toward the camera
vintage sedan driving along the street past the character

entered.detail: wooden food vendor cart with red and white panels
green metal dumpster on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection near the stadium, passing a food cart and a pedestrian. A vintage car drives by on the street as the character nears the crosswalk.

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the street
turns left at the corner and stops at a stop sign to observe traffic
crosses the brick-paved street while cars pass by in the background

agents.ego_description: crosses the street, turns left at the corner, waits at the stop sign observing traffic, then crosses again

notable_agents.action: maroon and white vintage car passing through the intersection
white van driving along the street

entered.detail: large brick industrial warehouse with multiple windows and a smokestack
octagonal stop sign on a pole at the street corner
cobblestone brick paving at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a busy intersection, crossing from the sidewalk onto a brick-paved crosswalk, turning left at the corner, and waiting at a stop sign. An industrial warehouse dominates the view while vintage traffic passes through the intersection.

events.description: crosses the street in front of a yellow taxi cab waiting at the curb

agents.ego_description: crosses the street and continues along the sidewalk past residential houses with ornate porches

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab waiting at the curb
woman standing on the sidewalk near the taxi

entered.detail: historic two-story houses with wooden porches and balconies
concrete wheelchair ramp leading up to a house entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street in front of a waiting taxi and walks along a residential sidewalk lined with historic houses featuring ornate porches. The stadium building is now visible across the street on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside stadium wall approaching overpass

events.description: passes a pedestrian carrying a black umbrella as a white car drives by

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside the stadium wall, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person walking with a black umbrella
white vintage car driving along the street

entered.detail: stone wall with repeating arched openings forming the base of the stadium
elevated highway or railway bridge visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk, now walking parallel to the stadium's arched stone wall. An elevated overpass is visible ahead in the distance as the character passes a pedestrian with an umbrella.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a damp urban district that shifts from an open street view toward the imposing architecture of a city stadium. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with vintage cars and apartment buildings, moving steadily toward a large stadium visible in the distance. As the character reaches a busy intersection, the scene shifts from the open sidewalk to a brick-paved crosswalk, passing a food cart and flowing traffic before pausing at a stop sign near a dominant industrial warehouse. The camera then follows the character across the street in front of a waiting taxi and past a row of historic houses with ornate porches. Finally, the path turns to run parallel to the stadium's arched stone wall, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella as an elevated overpass appears in the distance.
